comment: Synthetic Stage III resected cutaneous melanoma, 54M, ECOG 0, primary 3.2 mm Breslow with ulceration on the upper back, sentinel lymph node biopsy positive (1/3 nodes, single 2 mm metastasis), completed wide local excision + completion lymph-node dissection per surgeon judgment. BRAF V600E negative by NGS. Anchor target: KEYNOTE-054 adjuvant pembrolizumab × 12 months (12-mo recurrence-free benefit HR 0.57). KB DRIFT NOTE: at this KB baseline the melanoma KB has no adjuvant Stage III indication or algorithm — only ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L and ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-2L exist (gap explicitly noted in melanoma.yaml stage_strata stage_iii_regional vs the 1L/2L algorithms which are stage_iv only). Engine still resolves to ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L (the only line=1 melanoma algorithm) → step 0 (KIT absent) → step 1 (BRAF-V600-ACTIONABLE absent) → IND-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L-NIVO-IPI default. The metastatic-1L recommendation surfaced is NOT clinically appropriate for this resected Stage III patient — case carried for routing observability + to motivate a future ALGO-MELANOMA-ADJUVANT + IND-MELANOMA-ADJUVANT-PEMBRO-STAGE-III addition (KEYNOTE-054 adjuvant pembro × 12 mo). Engine smoke gates pass. MDT review required to override engine output until adjuvant track is wired.
